name: Nakabohtec Corrosion Protecting Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nakabohtec Corrosion Protecting Co.,Ltd. provides survey, analysis, design, engineering, work supervision, and material supply services for protecting metallic structures from corrosion. The company was formerly known as Nakagawa corrosion Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nakabohtec Corrosion Protecting Co.,Ltd. in 1991. Nakabohtec Corrosion Protecting Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
